epics.description: Comprehensive book listing functionality with viewing, sorting, filtering, searching, and navigation capabilities in table format
acceptanceCriteria: Users can view all books in paginated table format
Users can sort by title, author, genre, or year
Users can filter by genre, author, and year simultaneously
Users can search by title, author, or ISBN from header
Clicking book row navigates to details with preserved state

epics.description: Complete book creation workflow with required fields, optional metadata, cover image upload, and validation
deliverables: Add Book form with required fields validation
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add books with all 7 required fields
Optional fields (publisher, pages, price, stock, description) work correctly
Cover images can be uploaded via click or drag-drop
Form validates ISBN uniqueness and format
Success/error messages displayed appropriately

epics.description: Powerful search functionality with quick search, text field searches, dropdowns, range filters, sorting, boolean filters, and clear functionality
deliverables: Advanced search with text fields (title, author, ISBN, publisher)
Boolean filters (in stock, on sale, new releases)
acceptanceCriteria: Quick search matches title, author, ISBN across collection
Advanced search supports multiple text fields with AND logic
Dropdown filters provide exact match filtering
Range filters support year and price ranges
Results can be sorted by relevance, title, author, year, price, rating
Boolean filters work individually and in combination
Clear filters button resets all search criteria

epics.description: Book editing workflow with data loading, ISBN immutability, field updates, cover image replacement, and change detection
acceptanceCriteria: Edit form loads with current book data
ISBN field is read-only with visual indicator
Users can update any field except ISBN
Cover image can be replaced
System detects when no changes made
Cancel returns to details without saving

epics.description: Comprehensive book details display with cover, rating, price, metadata grid, description, view count tracking, and action buttons
deliverables: Rating display with stars and review count
Metadata grid (ISBN, publisher, year, language, pages, genre)
Metadata bar (book ID, dates, view count)
acceptanceCriteria: Details page displays all book information
Rating shown as stars with numeric value
Price shows current, original, and discount if applicable
All metadata fields displayed in organized grid
Description supports long text
View count increments on page load
Four action buttons navigate to respective functions

epics.description: Safe book deletion workflow with confirmation modal, book details preview, cancel option, and permanent deletion
deliverables: Book details shown in modal (title, ISBN)
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button shows modal with book details
Modal can be closed via cancel, ESC, or outside click
Confirm button sends DELETE request
Book removed from database permanently
User redirected to list after successful deletion

epics.description: Productivity features for duplicating books and exporting book data in multiple formats (JSON, CSV, PDF)
acceptanceCriteria: Duplicate creates copy with modified title and cleared ISBN
User navigated to edit form with duplicated data
Export as JSON downloads complete book object
Export as CSV creates spreadsheet-compatible file
Export as PDF creates formatted document with cover

epics.description: Mobile-first responsive design with optimized layouts for mobile phones and tablet devices
deliverables: Mobile layout (<768px) - single column, cards, hamburger menu
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile users see card layout instead of table
Forms stack to single column on mobile
Book details stack vertically on mobile
Tablet layout maintains 2-column forms
All touch targets meet 44x44px minimum
Tested on iPhone, Android, iPad devices

epics.description: User feedback system with loading skeletons, spinners, toast notifications, and empty states
deliverables: Skeleton loaders for tables and forms
acceptanceCriteria: Tables show skeleton loaders during data fetch
Forms show spinners during loading
Buttons disabled during submission with loading text
Success toasts appear for successful operations
Error toasts show specific error messages
Empty states provide actionable next steps

epics.description: Comprehensive accessibility features including keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and color contrast compliance
deliverables: Color contrast compliance (4.5:1 for normal text)
Focus indicators on all interactive elements
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements accessible via keyboard
Tab order follows logical visual order
ESC closes modals and dropdowns
ARIA labels present on all form inputs
Toast notifications announced to screen readers
Alt text on all images
Color contrast meets WCAG 2.1 AA (4.5:1)
Passes automated accessibility testing (axe, Lighthouse)

epics.description: Frontend and backend performance optimizations for fast page loads and API responses
acceptanceCriteria: Lighthouse performance score >90
First Contentful Paint <1.5s
Cumulative Layout Shift <0.1
Main bundle <200KB gzipped
API response time <500ms for 95% of requests
Database indexes on title, author, genre, year, ISBN
Search returns results <1s for 10,000 books
Debounced search reduces API calls

epics.description: Quick action buttons in the book list for edit and delete operations directly from the table
deliverables: Navigation from list to edit form
Navigation from list to delete modal
acceptanceCriteria: Edit button navigates to edit form with pre-populated data
Delete button opens delete modal with confirmation
Both buttons accessible via keyboard
After edit/delete, user returned to list
